articles.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
articles.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

articles.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
articles.summary: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

articles.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
articles.summary: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

articles.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
articles.summary: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

articles.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
articles.summary: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

articles.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
articles.summary: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

articles.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.

articles.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure

articles.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI

articles.title: Can't make sense of Dashlane's vault theft notification? You're not alone.
articles.summary: Security advisory leaves out key details. Dashlane maintains complete silence.

articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.summary: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.

articles.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
articles.summary: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.

articles.summary: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.

articles.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: Analyzing their SSD activity
articles.summary: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.

articles.title: Millions of AI agents imperiled by critical vulnerability in open source package
articles.summary: "BadHost" was found in Starlette, a package with 325 million weekly downloads.
